notes: v0.19.6 — Opponent ship + skin sync (you see their actual chosen ship, not a generic magenta one). Spawn fix (no more both-on-the-left). Score bug fixed (i_died was being dropped during the 3s 'matched → playing' transition). Old HUD hidden in PvP — no more overlap with the broadcast top bar / kill feed / track tile. Audio bars now actually react to the kick/bass. Arena outer 400px gray buffer removed so the audio-reactive bg sits right against the arena frame. Smooth interpolation for the opponent's ship (no more jitter).
